content.speakerText: Aren't you worried you might not come back?
content.speakerTextCn: 你不怕毕业后不回国吗？

options.text: I'm planning to stay forever — the lifestyle here is better.
No, I've got strong ties at home — my parents live there, my job offer's confirmed, and I'm the only child responsible for our family business.
I'm not sure yet — I'll decide after I graduate.
I don't have any family or job waiting for me back home.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了'strong ties at home'并列举了家庭、工作和责任三个关键要素，符合场景中证明回国决心的要求。选项1表达永久定居意图，与回国主题矛盾；选项3态度模糊，缺乏坚定性；选项4直接削弱回国理由，完全不符语境。

content.speakerText: Some people think studying abroad means you'll never return. What would you say to them?
content.speakerTextCn: 有些人认为出国留学就意味着你永远不会回来。你会怎么回应他们？

options.text: I agree — it's too hard to go back after getting used to life here.
I'm going back — my whole life's there, and I'm excited to contribute what I've learned.
I don't care what they think — I'm doing this for myself.
Maybe I'll stay if I find a good job — I'm not committed to going back.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了明确的回国意愿，并补充了‘贡献所学’的积极动机，符合场景中‘回应移民疑虑’的核心目标。选项1和4暗示不回国倾向，与主题冲突；选项3回避问题，未正面回应疑虑，缺乏说服力。

content.speakerText: You've been abroad for two years — why haven't you considered staying?
content.speakerTextCn: 你已经在国外两年了，为什么没考虑留下来？

options.text: I miss my hometown and the culture — I just wanna learn, then go home.
I'm waiting to see if I can get permanent residency — that's my goal now.
I don't have any family left in my country, so it doesn't matter.
I'm too tired to go back — I just want to relax here.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了场景中推荐的表达'just wanna learn, then go home'，简洁有力，体现学习目的明确且非永久定居。选项1是唯一符合回国意图的答案。其他选项均暗示放弃回国，与场景目标相悖。

content.template: I've got strong ties at home — my parents live there, my job offer's confirmed, and I'm the only child responsible for our family ______.
content.hint: 这是证明回国责任的关键词，常与‘only child’搭配使用
content.knowledgePoint: 家庭责任相关固定搭配

content.template: I'm going back — my whole life's ______.
content.hint: 表达‘所有生活都在那里’的简洁有力句型

content.template: I just wanna learn, then ______ home.
content.hint: 表达短期留学、明确回国意图的最常用动词

content.speakerText: Aren't you worried you might not come back?
content.speakerTextCn: 你不怕毕业后不回国吗？
expectedAnswers: No, I've got strong ties at home — my parents live there and I have a confirmed job offer.
I'm the only child, so I need to take over the family business — I have no choice but to return.
I'm studying to gain skills, not to stay — I'm excited to bring what I've learned back home.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确表达回国决心，而非犹豫或回避
是否使用至少两个场景关键词（如：strong ties, job offer, family business, only child）
表达是否自然流畅，符合口语习惯，无明显语法错误

content.speakerText: Why do you think you'll return after graduation, when so many others stay?
content.speakerTextCn: 为什么你认为自己毕业后会回国，而其他人却选择留下？
expectedAnswers: Because my family is there, and I’ve already signed a contract with a company back home.
I didn’t come abroad to escape — I came to grow, and then give back to my community.
My roots are in my hometown; I want to build my future there, not somewhere else.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰回应比较性问题，突出个人独特动机
是否使用情感或责任类词汇（如：roots, give back, build my future）增强说服力
语言是否自然、有逻辑性，避免机械背诵模板

content.speakerText: What would you say to someone who thinks studying abroad means you’re abandoning your country?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果有人认为出国留学就是抛弃自己的国家，你会怎么回应？
expectedAnswers: Studying abroad doesn’t mean abandoning my country — it means preparing to serve it better.
I’m not leaving forever; I’m borrowing knowledge to bring it back home.
My love for my country is why I’m studying — so I can help improve it when I return.
evaluationCriteria: 是否正面反驳误解，而非情绪化回应
是否使用隐喻或高级表达（如：borrowing knowledge, serve, improve）提升表达层次
是否体现文化认同与责任感，契合回国意向主题
